title: Update fkey with a values not in the pkey...
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (id INTEGER, name VARCHAR(1024), PRIMARY KEY(id));
CREATE TABLE t2 (id INTEGER DEFAULT 13, age INTEGER, PRIMARY KEY (id), FOREIGN KEY(id) REFERENCES t1(id));
UPDATE t2 SET id = 3 WHERE id = 1;
key_bug_features: Updating foreign key with non-existent primary key value
